title: crash when insert varchar/char/clob with default NULL
poc: create table test ( id int, name varchar(20) default null);
key_bug_features: insert with default NULL for varchar/char/clob
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test ( id int, name varchar(20) DEFAULT NULL, age int CHECK (age >= 0));
INSERT INTO test ( id, name ) VALUES ( 2, DEFAULT );
INSERT INTO test ( id, name ) SELECT 3, NULL;
INSERT INTO test ( id, name ) VALUES ( 4, 'John Doe' );
